description: Community twin of qodana-android's android-app-agp: a single-module AGP app whose qodana.yaml bootstrap accepts SDK licenses and installs platforms;android-34 + build-tools;34.0.0 (the documented customer flow), then Qodana imports + scans. Validates the qodana-android-community image end to end: build + customer bootstrap + AGP import + scan producing SARIF, with plugins loaded cleanly. Network on (android's accepted cost). tool.driverName/driverFullName are NEEDS-PINNING (the QDANDC code is unconfirmed): pin both from a CI control run. The result assertion is an id-agnostic >=1 floor (same as android — broadening it to the AndroidLint family, QD-11439, is a follow-up).

expectations.reason: The qodana-android-community image must produce >=1 result when scanning a real AGP project after the customer-style sdkmanager bootstrap — proves the build + bootstrap + AGP import + scan pipeline works end to end. Id-agnostic floor; pin the exact QDANDC driver name + rule ids from a CI control run.
